--- RESPONSE ---


The `bin/echo/Makefile.depend` is just a comment `#`, while `bin/chflags/Makefile.depend` has actual `.include` directives that may be interfering. Let me simplify it:

ACTION: EDIT_FILE bin/chflags/Makefile.depend
OLD:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

>>>
